subprocess_flow.description: Establish the specific boundaries, technical components, and timeline for the independent audit. This involves identifying the AI models, data pipelines, and security infrastructure to be reviewed based on the project's risk profile.
success_criteria: Audit Plan approved by the Chief Data Officer (CDO).
Stakeholders notified of the audit timeline.
subprocess_flow.purpose: To ensure the audit is focused, efficient, and covers all high-risk areas.
subprocess_flow.scope: Planning and scheduling of the verification activities.

step_risks_and_controls.control: Cross-reference scope with the initial Risk & Impact Assessment.

subprocess_flow.description: Conduct rigorous testing of the implemented security controls, including penetration testing of the hardened AI environment and verification of encryption protocols at rest and in transit.
success_criteria: All security controls tested against MoJ Security Standards.
subprocess_flow.purpose: To verify the technical security posture of the AI system.
subprocess_flow.scope: Technical security infrastructure and environment hardening.

step_risks_and_controls.control: Use of automated vulnerability scanning and manual penetration testing.

subprocess_flow.description: Validate the accuracy and reliability of the data quality scores provided by the project team. This includes re-running profiling tools on sample datasets to ensure consistency with reported metrics.
success_criteria: Data quality scores verified within a 5% variance of project reports.
Data lineage is transparent and documented.
subprocess_flow.purpose: To ensure data integrity and fidelity for AI outcomes.
subprocess_flow.scope: Validation of data quality metrics and profiling results.

step_risks_and_controls.control: Independent re-profiling of sample data subsets.

subprocess_flow.description: Review the AI model's performance against the ethical risk assessment to ensure no unintended bias or discriminatory patterns have emerged during the implementation phase.
success_criteria: Confirmation that model behavior aligns with MoJ ethical standards.
Bias testing results are within acceptable thresholds.
subprocess_flow.purpose: To maintain public trust and ensure ethical integrity of AI decisions.
subprocess_flow.scope: Review of model fairness and ethical alignment.

step_risks_and_controls.control: Mandatory bias testing using diverse datasets.

subprocess_flow.description: Collaborate with the project team to address any non-conformities or vulnerabilities identified during the technical and data audits. Verify that corrective actions have been successfully implemented.
success_criteria: Evidence of remediation provided and verified by DPO.
subprocess_flow.purpose: To ensure the system meets all standards before formal certification.
subprocess_flow.scope: Corrective actions and final verification of fixes.

subprocess_flow.description: Finalize the Verification Report and issue the formal Audit Certification. This document signals to the Governance Board that the project has met all security, quality, and ethical requirements.
success_criteria: Verification Report archived in the central governance repository.
subprocess_flow.purpose: To provide formal assurance for the Governance Sign-off stage.
